central_tension: Every state wants security. Every culture wants memory. Every dynasty wants survival. Every army needs food. Every magic-user is a weapon, asset, liability and political problem.
one_sentence_summary: Orran is a war-scarred continent around an inland sea where humans, orcs, elves and dwarves build kingdoms, leagues, holds, clans and temple states over the bones of an old road empire, while rare mana-users are registered, feared, bought, married, imprisoned and marched to war as specialist assets that can change history but never escape its costs.
prime_rule: Magic may change history, but it must never delete food, roads, disease, weather, debt, manpower, inheritance, morale, geography or fear.
